item.title: Host your own website
item.description: Cheapskate’s Guide Home Contact Share on … [Facebook] [[Twitter]](https://twitter.com/share?url=https://cheapskatesguide.org/articles/raspberry-pi-website.html/&text=How to have Your Own Website for $2 a Year) [[Reddit]](https://reddit.com/submit?url=https://cheapskatesguide.org/articles/raspberry-pi-website.html&title=How to have Your Own Website for $2 a Year) [Linkedin] [[Hacker News]](https://news.ycombinator.com/submit?u=https://cheapskatesguide.org/articles/raspberry-pi-website.html&t=How to have Your Own Website for $2 a Year) How to Host Your Own Website at Home for $2 a Year # 11-30-18 Lasted Updated: 7-3-20 This article has been updated to show the user how to install the Raspbian Buster operating system, also known as Raspberry Pi OS.
